fields.AvoidOcclusion: When the camera is behind a wall or anything that is collidable, it will zoom the view in front of it to focus on the subject. This will not work in manual mode.
fields.KeepInWorldSpace: This keeps the camera in world space.
fields.MovementWobble: This makes the camera have gradual movement in different positions around the subject. This only works with Third Person or Group modes.
